← 스토리 목록으로

2258255E401F2CD1A58435B4B49E2D81, Secret in a Bottle

Main Story

2258255E401F2CD1A58435B4B49E2D81”, “Secret in a Bottle

퀘스트 배경

4D24BAC7449092F5B9A15E8BF1CB12B4”, “Celine found a mysterious bottle washed up on the shore.

진행 상황

98FA4B72438DC1874094648837E84736”, “Deliver the sealed bottle with a strange library mark to Sean.

완료

FBFD9709432BC8D38315029D7080B4D8”, “Sean recognizes the mark and examines the bottle carefully.
